parameters.name: active
parameters.label: Active
parameters.description: Enable or disable the output card.

parameters.name: device
parameters.label: Device
parameters.description: A menu of available video devices to output to. Set the Library parameter above prior to selecting your device.

parameters.name: signalformat
parameters.label: Signal Format
parameters.description: The signal format to output at. This is the resolution and the frame rate, as well as if the frames are progressive or interlaced. Note that when using an interlaced format, the rate refers to fields

parameters.name: outputcolorformat
parameters.label: Output Color Format
parameters.description: Set the color format of the data sent out, for supported devices. YUV 4:2:2 or RGB 4:4:4

parameters.name: referencesource
parameters.label: Reference Source
parameters.description: On AJA devices what input to use as a reference source input.

parameters.name: audiochop
parameters.label: Audio CHOP
parameters.description: If you want to embed audio data into the output, put the path to a here.

parameters.name: bufferlength
parameters.label: Buffer Length
parameters.description: The length in seconds to buffer the audio data, to avoid crackles and pops.

parameters.name: manualfield
parameters.label: Manual Field Control
parameters.description: When outputting interlaced video if you are using a source video that is also interlaced, it's likely you'll want to make sure you are keeping the odd/even fields in sync, otherwise the video will loo

parameters.name: firstfield
parameters.label: First Field
parameters.description: Tells the Video Device Out if the current frame being given as it's input is the First or Second field in the final output image, when outputting an interlaced video. Look at the description for Manua

parameters.name: timecodeop
parameters.label: Timecode Object/CHOP/DAT
parameters.description: Embed timecode into the output. A reference to either a with channels 'hour', 'second', 'minute', 'frame', a with a timecode string in its first cell, or a object.

parameters.name: syncoutputs
parameters.label: Sync Outputs
parameters.description: Only currently supported on the FLEX line of cards. This will cause multiple FLEX cards to output their content in sync with each other.

parameters.name: syncgroupindex
parameters.label: Sync Group Index
parameters.description: For different groups of cards, they can be ganged together into different sync groups by specifying the same index for multiple cards in the same group.

parameters.name: resetstats
parameters.label: Reset Stats
parameters.description: A pulse to reset the statistics in an attached .

parameters.name: colorspace
parameters.label: Output Color Space
parameters.description: Controls what color space the data will be converted to before output. If the output (SDI/ST2110 etc) supports metadata, will also attempt to include the color space in that. Some output forms only su

parameters.name: outputreferencewhite
parameters.label: Output Reference White
parameters.description: When converting the color values to the Working Color Space for output, this controls how they should be treated with respect to . If the Working Color Space is the same White, then no adjustment is d

parameters.name: driver
parameters.label: Driver
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: outputbitdepth
parameters.label: Outputbitdepth
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: memorymode
parameters.label: Memorymode
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: customresolutionh
parameters.label: Customresolutionh
parameters.description: Help Not Available.
